original_final_question: Which year from 2015-2023 has the highest total number of drug overdose deaths across U.S. states, using December 12 month-ending values and excluding the U.S. total? Your response should be in the format [Answer].
reasoning_chain_text: 1. Sum December overdose deaths by year from 2015-2023 and select the maximum.
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1: Sum December 12 month-ending overdose deaths by Year and select the maximum; the peak year is 2022.
